changeLog.what: Added description, anatomy description, usage guidelines and properties

properties.name: Validation text
properties.description: The text that is shown if the select is in a validation describing the reason for the validation state.

properties.name: Validation state
properties.description: Wether the component is in a validation state and if provided in which validation state the component is.

properties.name: Select options
properties.description: The list of options a user can select from.

table.name: Validation text
table.description: Semantically colored text that describes the reason of the validation state.

table.name: Validation icon
table.description: A semantic icon that is shown if the select component is in a validation state.

table.name: Chevron
table.description: A chevron that hints to the user that something with more choices will open up upon clicking. Differentiator to the text input element.

table.name: Text
table.description: The text that is shown in the select component.
